body.title: Scraps: rack gatekeeper device with ticket validation + sign-off
body.result: Scraps rack device shipped: rule-based validation + optional Qwen 8 fuzzy pass; scraps_validate_ticket MCP tool wired into librarian; 132 tests pass
body.description:
Igor files placeholder tickets with no body (T-claude-1: 'HIGH work', T-nw-1: 'legacy ticket') that waste sprint cycles and are unattributable. No structural gate exists to block them.

Build `devices/scraps/` in agent_datacenter — a BaseDevice rack device named after one of the Igors' dogs. Role: queue gatekeeper that validates ticket content before state transitions are allowed.

Tiered validation logic:
  1. Rule-based first (no LLM): non-empty description, non-generic title, at least one structured section present. Clear pass/fail.
  2. Low-confidence escalation: if rules pass but content is vague/minimal, call Qwen 8 via InferenceDevice (local Ollama) for a fuzzy 'does this look useful?' check.
  3. Cloud inference (Haiku/OR) is NOT used here — reserved for urgent human-requested work, not background gating.

When ticket passes: stamps `scraps_validated: <iso-ts>` into ticket metadata. When ticket fails: returns issue list with specific gaps.

**Affected files:** devices/scraps/__init__.py, devices/scraps/scraps_device.py, devices/scraps/validation_rules.py, skeleton/registry/ (registration entry)
**Design rules:** BaseDevice OOP first; no TheIgors imports; no SQLite; Qwen 8 inference goes through InferenceDevice (not direct Ollama call); graceful degradation when InferenceDevice offline (return valid=True with warning, never hard-block on device offline)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: device skeleton, tiered rule+Qwen8 validation, MCP tool `scraps_validate_ticket(ticket_json) -> {valid, issues, validated_at}`, sign-off stamp write. Out of scope: cc_queue.py wiring (T-cc-queue-scraps-gate), UI display of scraps_validated, retroactive scan of existing tickets.
**Test plan:** unit tests for each rule (empty desc fails, generic title 'HIGH work' fails, structured section passes); test Qwen 8 called only on low-confidence rule result; test sign-off stamp written to metadata on pass; test graceful degradation when InferenceDevice offline returns valid=True + warning
